# Exchange Rates and Trade {#sec-trade}

Exchange rates transmit monetary policy, reflect relative economic prospects, and reshape trade flows. This chapter covers purchasing power parity, real effective exchange rates, and gravity models.

## Purchasing power parity

## Real effective exchange rates

## The Big Mac Index

## Gravity models of trade

## Exercises

1. Using `readecb::ecb_exchange_rate()`, download the EUR/GBP rate since the Brexit referendum (June 2016). Identify the three largest single-day moves.

2. Download PPP-adjusted GDP per capita from the World Bank for the G20. How does the ranking differ from market exchange rate GDP per capita?
